message.content:
@startuml
skinparam ClassDiagram fontname "Segoe UI"

class IFileHelperService {
    <<interface>>
    dirPath : string
}

class FileHelperService {
    <<class>>
    dirPath : string
    <<readonly>>
}

class IHostEnvironment {
    <<interface>>
}

class IUnitOfWork {
    <<interface>>
}

class DocumentoAula {
    <<class>>
}

class DocumentoAulaDTO {
    <<class>>
}

FileHelperService <|-- IFileHelperService

FileHelperService <<class>>
dirPath : string
<<readonly>>

FileHelperService(FileHelperService(environment: IHostEnvironment, uow: IUnitOfWork))

FileHelperService <<async>>
GetSingleFileAsync(documentId: long) : Task<(string, byte[])>

FileHelperService <<async>>
GetSingleFileAsync(arquivo: DocumentoAula) : Task<byte[]>

FileHelperService <<async>>
SaveFileAsync(fileDTO: FileDTO) : Task<string>

FileHelperService
GetFullPath() : string

FileHelperService <<async>>
DeleteFile(documentId: long) : Task

FileHelperService <<async>>
DeleteFile(caminhoArquivo: string) : void

FileHelperService <<async>>
GetDocumentoAula(aulaId: long) : Task<DocumentoAulaDTO>

IHostEnvironment <|-- FileHelperService

IUnitOfWork <|-- FileHelperService

IHostEnvironment <<class>>
dirPath : string

IUnitOfWork <<class>>
dirPath : string

@enduml
